entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A photosynthetically efficient crop with high potential pod yields grown in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where groundnut potential has been demonstrated and research is focused

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The measure of pod production per unit area, with records exceeding 9.0 t/ha

entities.name: RAINED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practice relying on rainfall, where 80% of groundnut is grown

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural production, showing a gap between potential and realized levels

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors affecting crop growth, such as drought

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A specific abiotic stress affecting groundnut

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Living organisms causing stress, such as foliar diseases and aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: FOLIAR DISEASES
entities.description: Biotic stresses affecting the leaves of the groundnut plant

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: A biotic stress involving fungal toxins in groundnut

entities.name: ECO-REGIONAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a crop to adapt to specific ecological regions

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Emerging tools used for crop improvement

entities.name: GENETIC TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: A biotechnological tool for crop improvement

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A biotechnological tool for crop improvement

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors influencing crop growth and genotype interaction

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of the plant and the environment it is grown in

entities.name: IMPROVED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Varieties of groundnut developed for better performance

entities.name: IMPROVED CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Enhanced farming techniques to increase productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production, influenced by cultivars and cultural practices

entities.name: FARMER-PARTICIPATORY VARIETAL SELECTION
entities.description: An approach involving farmers in the selection of improved varieties

entities.name: INFORMAL SEED SECTOR
entities.description: The non-formal system of seed exchange and production

entities.name: QUALITY SEED
entities.description: High-standard seeds required for groundnut cultivation

entities.name: SEED RATE
entities.description: The amount of seed sown per unit area

entities.name: MULTIPLICATION RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of seed produced to seed sown
